questions.question: Differentiate between an undirected network and a directed network. Provide a real-world example of each.
expectedPoints: Example of undirected network (e.g., Facebook friendship).
Example of directed network (e.g., Twitter follow).

questions.question: For the given undirected network diagram (e.g., nodes A-E with specific connections), (a) calculate the degree of each node, (b) list all shortest paths from node A to node E, (c) calculate the density of the network, and (d) determine the network diameter.
expectedPoints: Accurate degree calculation for all nodes.
Correct identification of all shortest paths between the specified nodes.
Correct application of the density formula for an undirected network.
Correct calculation of the diameter by finding the longest shortest path.
Clear presentation of all steps and results.
